Our story

The perfect shirt, refused to fall apart.

Meridian started with one frustration: the perfect white tee that went thin after a single season. We spent two years sourcing long-staple organic cotton, refining a heavier 240gsm knit, and obsessing over collars that hold their shape.

Today we cut and finish every shirt in small runs — no endless SKUs, no churn. Just the essentials, considered down to the seam.

— Made in small runs, restocked not replaced.

The collection

Five shirts, done right.

A deliberately small range. Each one earns its place in the drawer.

01

The Everyday Tee

240gsm organic combed cotton in classic or boxy fit. The one you'll reach for first, every single morning.

Shop the teeHeavyweight knit
02

The Washed Oxford

A soft-from-day-one button-down with a structured collar that keeps its roll, wash after wash.

Shop the oxfordMidweight 140gsm
03

The Heavyweight Crew

Structured, opaque, and built to hold its shape through years of wash days and weekend wear.

Shop the crewStructured knit
04

The Linen Camp Shirt

Breathable European linen, relaxed through the body and ready for the warm months ahead.

Shop the linenPure linen
05

Custom & Monogram

Add a quiet monogram online, or talk to us about small-run embroidery for teams and gifts.

Start a custom orderMade to order

Why Meridian

The difference is in what you don't see.

Anyone can sell a plain shirt. These details are why ours come back from the wash looking new.

Long-staple organic cotton

Smoother, stronger fibres that resist pilling and keep their hand-feel for years.

Pre-shrunk & colorfast

Garment-washed before you ever see them — what you try on is what you keep.

Reinforced collars & seams

Double-stitched stress points and taped shoulders that hold their shape.

How it works

From drawer to doorstep.

01

Find your fit

Take our 30-second fit quiz online, or book a fitting at the Valencia St flagship.

02

Choose your shirts

Order online or in-store. We keep the line tight on purpose, so the choice is easy.

03

Wear them in

Free 30-day returns and free repairs on seams and buttons, for the life of the shirt.

The only tee that's survived a year of weekly washes without going see-through. I bought five.

Good to know

Questions, answered.

What weight is the cotton?+
Our tees are a heavyweight 240gsm organic combed cotton; oxfords are a midweight 140gsm washed cotton. Both stay opaque and hold their shape.
How do your shirts fit?+
We offer classic and boxy fits. Every product page lists full measurements, or book a flagship fitting and we'll size you in person.
Do they shrink?+
Everything is pre-shrunk and garment-washed, so what you try on is what you keep. Wash cold, hang or tumble low.
What's your return policy?+
Free 30-day returns on unworn shirts, plus free repairs on seams and buttons for the life of the shirt.
Do you do custom or team orders?+
Yes — add a monogram online, or talk to us about small-run embroidery for teams, events, and gifts.

Where we serve

Nationwide online. At home in SF.

Free carbon-neutral shipping across the U.S. Our Valencia St flagship is a quick walk for these neighborhoods:

The MissionHayes ValleyNoe ValleySoMaThe CastroBernal HeightsPotrero HillCole Valley
